description_long: This is a pair of women's open-toe heeled sandals featuring a single wide strap across the forefoot. The strap is adorned with a vibrant, multicolored snakeskin pattern in shades of blue, black, and white, giving the shoes a fashionable and eye-catching appearance. The insole and heel are a solid, muted gray, with a slightly textured surface for comfort and grip. The heels are moderately high and taper inward, providing an elegant silhouette suitable for urban outings. The shoes appear to be made from synthetic materials, likely faux leather or fabric for the upper, and a sturdy plastic or rubber for the sole and heel. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the overall condition is pristine, suggesting they are new.
description: A pair of open-toe heeled sandals with a blue, black, and white snakeskin-patterned strap and solid gray insole and heel. The shoes are stylish, new, and suitable for urban wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tapered black heels and the open back of the sandals.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the moderate heel height, the textured gray insole, and the colorful snakeskin-patterned strap.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open-toe design and the full width of the patterned strap across the forefoot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the sandals and the consistent design features.
